description: Three days after US and Israeli air strikes started hitting their country, Iranians are torn between conflicting emotions: many are expressing joy for what they see as an opportunity to topple the Islamic regime, but also fear that the strikes will cause more civilian casualties. Two of our Observers in Iran describe what they have been going through since February 28.

title: Are US-Israeli attacks against Iran legal under international law?
description: Analysts say the joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran appear to breach the UN Charters prohibition on aggression.

title: France to send anti-drone systems to Cyprus after British base attack – report
description:

title: Kuwaitis seen helping US fighter pilot after plane shot down
description:

title: Lockheed Martin Tests Missile-Evasion AI on X-62 VISTA
description: The Have Remy Test Management Project saw USAF Test Pilot School students directly involved in an AI agent’s development, simulation and live trial with Lockheed Martin’s Skunk Works. title: Russia to supply Iran with shoulder-fired air defense system
description:
Russia and Iran have reportedly finalized a contract for the sale of 500 Russian “Verba” man-portable air defense systems (MANPADS) and 2,500 missiles as Iran tries to shore up its air defenses. However, it is unlikely that these weapons would significantly impact potential US operations against the Islamic Republic.
The post Russia to supply Iran with shoulder-fired air defense system appeared first on FDDs Long War Journal.

title: US, Israel pound Iran as Trump signals willingness to talk to new Iranian leadership
description: Trump said the U.S. would “avenge” the deaths of three U.S. service members and that “there will likely be more” killed before the conflict ends.

title: Trump faces MAGA mounting criticism on Iran war
description: President Donald Trump on Monday pushed back against mounting criticism that he hasn't done enough to explain why it was necessary to start a war with Iran now or to articulate his vision for an endgame to the escalating conflict. The frustration is coming not just from the political left but also from his “Make America Great Again” base, as the conflict expands, energy prices surge, and the death toll in the Middle East rises.

title: What is the 'Axis of Resistance', the proxy forces supporting Iran?
description: Since Israel and the United States launched a barrage of strikes on Iran Saturday, Tehran’s allies and proxies in the region have had a minimal role in the response.
